key_drivers: Rising real yields (DFII10 at 2.01%, +18bps over 1 week) weighing on gold, equities, and tech
Iran war driving elevated geopolitical risk, oil supply disruption premium, and safe-haven demand for JPY and EUR
Gold ETF outflows ($7.07B in March, largest since 2013) and widening credit spreads signaling risk-off rotation into oil and safe-haven FX

fallbacks_used: News research for gold ETF flows, geopolitical risk, central bank stances
Investing.com for copper and SOX historical data
Multiple news sources for VIX level (~26-27) and DXY (~99.27)
